Hi, I'm

Patricio Betancourt

Full Stack Web Developer

Passionate about designing clean, efficient, and scalable solutions. Specialized in React, Python, Node.js, and Java. I adapt quickly to new environments and enjoy collaborating in multidisciplinary teams to create technology that adds real value.

Data Scientist

Projects

A selection of web development and software projects I've built.

AI Coffee Classifier

Computer vision model for the classification of green arabica coffee beans, developed as an academic internship.
Python IA Deep Learning
View project

Paper: Coffee Classification with Swin Transformer V2

Binary classification model for green arabica coffee from Loja based on Swin Transformer V2. Stands out for its high accuracy (100% in tests), interpretable validation with Grad-CAM.
Python IA Deep Learning Swin Transformer Paper
View project

Hexia Corporate Website

Complete implementation in React with responsive design, email integration for contact, and continuous deployment.
React JavaScript HTML5 CSS3
View project

Personal Portfolio

This very portfolio, designed in React with TailwindCSS, multi-language and light/dark mode.
React JavaScript Vite Tailwind
View project

About Me

Full Stack Developer with a Software Engineering degree.

I'm a Full Stack Web Developer trained in Software Engineering at the National University of Loja. With a solid command of Python, JavaScript (React/Node.js), and Java, I seek to apply my developer skills to create technology that adds value and solves complex problems. My experience in web development and software development projects has given me a solid foundation in agile methodologies, RESTful API design, and version control with Git.

Clean & scalable code

Computer Science Engineer – UNL

Mention in Smart Systems

Team collaboration

Agile methodologies

Let's Talk

I am currently open to new opportunities as a Full Stack Web Developer. If you have a project in mind or think I could be a good fit for your software development team, feel free to contact me.
